Interface ILasFile

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to members of LasFile.

[Guid("36CCBFD3-8A6C-4C11-8551-96AE8629AAD9")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ILasFile

Properties

Extent

The XYZ extent of points in the LAS file.

IEnvelope Extent { get; }

Property Value

IEnvelope

Indicates GPS time is available.
